## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, blog performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance continues to improve with 437 clicks (up from 415) and 500 more impressions this week](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [8 integration pages ready for review/publishing once logos are added](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [In-content CTAs to be implemented on all blog posts, placed near the conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Content enrichment for 10 articles nearly complete, 5 more to be identified for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Update

  - [Another week of steady upswing in performance](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [437 clicks (vs 415 last week) and 500 more impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Best performing week to date, despite holiday season slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Individual article stats updated in Airtable for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [8 integration pages left in drafts, awaiting logo additions](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Previously discussed issues (code snippets, missing descriptions) have been resolved](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [39 pages launched so far, generating 120 clicks on 1K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

### Content Enrichment

  - [10 articles nearly complete, awaiting visuals/screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Additions include "Our Take" sections, article summaries, new intros](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [5 more top-performing articles to be identified for enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Aim to complete before holiday break (Dec 30)](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### In-Content CTAs

  - [One CTA banner per article due to current A/B testing limitations](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [CTAs to be placed near article conclusion for now](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Strapi 5 banner link TBD (Nicholas to provide input)](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Download CE CTA to link directly to docs](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Guidelines to be updated with specific CTA placement instructions](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Blog Updates and Planning

  - [66 new articles published, 8 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Updating SEO titles from "2024 guide" to "2025 guide"](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [CTAs to be added to all existing (66) and new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to add logos to remaining 8 integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Golzar to confirm Strapi 5 CTA link with Nicholas](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Golzar to update CTA placement guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Team to implement CTAs on all blog posts before holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Update SEO titles to "2025 guide" where applicable](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Identify 5 additional top-performing articles for content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/4RAKG_y93qbVb_zpyrNH9c8yo9fMdT5B?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
